executive_view.top_constraint: Outcome capture exists, but CYVX needs repeated outcome volume to calibrate trust.
executive_view.biggest_risk: Architecture growth outpacing real-world outcome volume.
executive_view.single_next_action: Collect and process 10 real realities through the flywheel and capture outcomes.

leverage_map.reason: Every outcome improves trust, prediction accuracy, and learning.
Creates measurable intelligence instead of static analysis.
Keeps CYVX learning without manual uploads.
